subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined by the lights of the Covenant! Blessed art thou, for thou hast been faithful to God's Covenant and discharged His trust [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استشرق من انوار المیثاق طوبی لک بما وفیت بعهد الله و ادیت امانه الله و
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant
